title: 10 best herbal tinctures for open pores
description: Cleavers tinctures helps with open pores because it contains saponins, which have a unique ability to break down and disperse excess cellular debris and toxins that can clog pores. This natural cleansing process allows for a deeper penetration of the skin by promoting lymphatic drainage and stimulating the immune system to eliminate impurities. As a result, pores appear smaller and more refined, reducing the appearance of acne, blackheads, and other skin imperfections....
